moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships are in full swing at the All England Club, with today marking the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Second Round action.

angles.name: Live Match Buzz
angles.copy: Centre Court drama is unfolding! Who are you backing in today's second-round Wimbledon clashes? Let us know!

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: The eyes of the sporting world are on SW19! London is buzzing with Wimbledon fever as the tournament enters its second round. Who's heading down?

moments.title: World Cup Round of 32: England in Action
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues its knockout stage today with Round of 32 matches, including England facing DR Congo for a spot in the last 16.

angles.name: England Match Day
angles.copy: It's knockout football! England are playing DR Congo in the World Cup Round of 32 today. Can the Three Lions advance? Score predictions!

angles.name: Global Footy Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup Round of 32 means every game counts. Who's delivering the biggest shocks and standout performances so far?

moments.title: UK Heatwave incoming!
moments.blurb: Temperatures are set to soar across England and Wales in an impending heatwave, with some areas in the South East potentially hitting 30-36C over the next 10 days.

angles.name: General Heatwave Alert
angles.copy: Sun's out, thermometers are up! A heatwave is on its way across much of the UK. How are you planning to stay cool?

angles.name: Devon Heatwave
angles.copy: Exeter and Devon are bracing for a heatwave with temperatures expected to hit 27C! Where's your favourite spot to cool off in the county?

angles.name: Wales Sun Alert
angles.copy: Warm weather is heading for Wales! Stay hydrated and sun-safe as temperatures rise across the nation. What are your top tips for beating the heat?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Top 100 Update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' has climbed to number one on the Official Singles Chart Top 100, with Olivia Rodrigo scoring the highest new entry.

angles.name: New Number One
angles.copy: New number one! Huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean as 'Rein Me In' hits the top spot on the Official Singles Chart. What a track!

angles.name: Olivia Rodrigo Chart Domination
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo is dominating the charts again with 'Stupid Song' as the highest new entry and multiple tracks in the Top 5! What's your favourite new Olivia track?

moments.title: Harry Styles' Wembley Residency
moments.blurb: Harry Styles continues his 'Together, Together' residency at Wembley Stadium this week, with shows on July 1, 3, and 4.

angles.name: Wembley Style
angles.copy: Harry Styles takes over Wembley again tonight! If you're heading to one of his London shows this week, get ready for a dazzling night of hits. What's your must-hear Harry song?

angles.name: London Gig Buzz
angles.copy: Wembley is going wild for Harry Styles! With shows tonight, Friday, and Saturday, the capital is definitely 'Golden'. Who's got tickets?

moments.title: Happy 81st to Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of new wave legends Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday today, July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 81st birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry! From 'Heart of Glass' to 'Call Me', her influence on music is undeniable. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: New Wave Queen
angles.copy: The ultimate new wave queen, Debbie Harry, celebrates her birthday today! Still rocking at 81, she's an inspiration. Share your favourite Debbie Harry look!

moments.title: Missy Elliott Turns 55
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday today, July 1st.

angles.name: Hip Hop Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 55th birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott! A true innovator in hip-hop and music video. What's your favourite Missy track or video?

angles.name: Timeless Tracks
angles.copy: Still got 'Get Ur Freak On' on repeat? Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott, turning 55 today!

moments.title: Tate McRae's 23rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Canadian singer-songwriter and dancer Tate McRae, known for hits like 'greedy', celebrates her 23rd birthday today, July 1st.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 23rd birthday to pop sensation Tate McRae! From viral dances to chart-topping hits, she's everywhere. What's your favourite Tate track right now?

angles.name: Celebrating Tate
angles.copy: She's only 23 and already a global star! Wishing a fantastic birthday to Tate McRae today. Keep the hits coming!

moments.title: Women's T20 World Cup Final in London
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup concludes this Sunday, July 5th, with the final being held at Lord's Cricket Ground in London.

angles.name: Cricket Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on! This Sunday, July 5th, the ICC Women's T20 World Cup final takes place at Lord's. Who are your favourites to lift the trophy?

angles.name: London Hosting
angles.copy: Lord's is ready! London hosts the ICC Women's T20 World Cup final this Sunday. A huge moment for women's sport in the capital!

angles.name: Wales & Cricket
angles.copy: With the ICC Women's T20 World Cup co-hosted in Wales, it's been a fantastic tournament! Catch the final this Sunday. Who do you think will win?

moments.title: Metallica's London Stadium Shows
moments.blurb: Heavy metal titans Metallica are bringing their 'No Repeat Weekend' to London Stadium on July 3rd and 5th, promising two unique sets.

angles.name: Metal Mayhem
angles.copy: Metallica are hitting London Stadium this weekend for two massive shows! Get ready for some serious headbanging. What's your ultimate Metallica anthem?

angles.name: London Rock
angles.copy: The East End is about to rumble! Metallica's 'No Repeat Weekend' at London Stadium promises an unforgettable experience. Who's going?

moments.title: New ITVX Thriller: The Dark
moments.blurb: The Dark, a new tense thriller set in the Scottish wilderness about a detective hunting a serial killer, premieres on ITVX this July.

angles.name: New Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge-watch? 'The Dark', a gripping new serial killer thriller set in the Scottish wilderness, is out on ITVX this month. Are you tuning in?

angles.name: Scottish Drama
angles.copy: Our stunning Scottish landscapes are the backdrop for a new ITVX thriller, 'The Dark'! Who's excited to see Scotland shine (or scare) on screen?

moments.title: Heartstopper Forever on Netflix
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated film 'Heartstopper Forever', concluding the beloved series, premieres on Netflix this July, following Nick and Charlie's relationship challenges.

angles.name: Heartstopper Hype
angles.copy: Grab the tissues! 'Heartstopper Forever' lands on Netflix this July, promising an emotional conclusion to Nick and Charlie's story. Who's ready for it?

angles.name: New Netflix Film
angles.copy: Your favourite queer love story gets its film conclusion this month! 'Heartstopper Forever' is coming to Netflix. What are your hopes for Nick and Charlie?

moments.title: Trying Season 5 Returns
moments.blurb: The popular Apple TV+ comedy 'Trying' returns for its fifth season this July, with Nikki and Jason facing new family challenges.

angles.name: Comedy Comeback
angles.copy: Good news, 'Trying' fans! Season 5 of the heartwarming Apple TV+ comedy is back this July. What chaos will Nikki and Jason get into next?

angles.name: Weekend Watchlist
angles.copy: Need a new show for the weekend? 'Trying' Season 5 is here! Who's excited to catch up with Nikki and Jason?

moments.title: Huey Lewis Turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis & The News, known for hits like 'The Power of Love', celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: It's gonna be a 'Hip to Be Square' kind of weekend! Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to the fantastic Huey Lewis on July 5th!

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Can you feel 'The Power of Love'? Get ready to celebrate Huey Lewis's 76th birthday this Sunday! What's your favourite track from him?

moments.title: John Keeble of Spandau Ballet Turns 67
moments.blurb: John Keeble, the drummer of iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Spandau Beat
angles.copy: He's the beat behind the New Romantic sound! Happy 67th birthday to John Keeble of Spandau Ballet on July 6th. What's your favourite Spandau track?

angles.name: True Gold
angles.copy: Raise a glass to 'True Gold'! Wishing a very happy birthday to Spandau Ballet's John Keeble this Monday. Still got those moves?

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! The one and only Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday this Tuesday. What's your favourite Ringo moment, with or without The Beatles?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: From Liverpool to legend! Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr on July 7th. Still got the best beat!

moments.title: BTS Hits Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
moments.blurb: K-Pop superstars BTS are playing their only UK dates this year at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on July 6th and 7th.

angles.name: ARMY Assemble!
angles.copy: BTS are bringing their massive tour to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on July 6th & 7th! Who's got tickets to see the K-Pop kings?

angles.name: London K-Pop Fever
angles.copy: Get ready, London ARMY! BTS are set to ignite Tottenham Hotspur Stadium next week. Expect an atmosphere like no other!

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Approaching
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games are set to kick off in Glasgow, Scotland from July 23rd to August 2nd, with Team England already announcing its boxing squad.

angles.name: Glasgow Games Countdown
angles.copy: Just weeks to go until the Commonwealth Games land in Glasgow! Scotland is ready to host a fantastic festival of sport. Which events are you most excited for?

angles.name: Team England Boxing
angles.copy: Team England's boxing squad is confirmed for the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games! Keep an eye out for rising star Ruby White. Who are your ones to watch?

moments.title: Roundhay Festival in Leeds
moments.blurb: American Express presents Roundhay Festival takes place this Saturday, July 4th, in Leeds, bringing a day of music and entertainment.

angles.name: Leeds Festival Fun
angles.copy: Leeds, get ready for Roundhay Festival this Saturday! Who are you excited to see at this year's event in Roundhay Park?

angles.name: Weekend Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Looking for weekend plans? Roundhay Festival is happening in Leeds this Saturday! Good vibes and great music guaranteed. Who's heading there?
